discord_channel_created.note: Bot auto-creates channel and adds client on join

ghl_subaccount_configured.note: Create GHL sub-account and configure settings

facebook_access_granted.note: Client grants access to Meta Business Manager

client_media_submitted.note: Client sends photos/videos via Discord or onboarding funnel

ad_scripts_written.note: Media buyer writes ad scripts (future: AI-assisted from Fathom call)

ad_scripts_sent_to_client.note: Send to client via their Discord channel

ad_scripts_approved.note: Client reviews, revises if needed, then approves. Mark done when final approval received.

meta_campaigns_built.note: Build campaigns in Meta Ads Manager

onboarding_call_booked.note: Send booking link to client in their Discord channel. Bot sends message automatically when all deps are met.

onboarding_call_completed.note: Mark done after the call. Checklist: calendar connected, CRM access granted, test lead run.

campaigns_launched.note: Account manager flips campaigns on in Meta Ads Manager

48hr_health_check.note: Verify leads are coming in and everything is running correctly. Not a performance review.
